source: Emitter oracle (Task P4): a FIXED-parameter (no fit) seeded ISimulatable draw off the RMC.BestFit AutoRegressive model (Numerics @ a2c4dbf, RMC-BestFit @ fc28c0c), dumped via tools/oracle_emitter and reproduced by tools/verify_oracles.py. Because the parameters are pinned (not optimized), this isolates the seeded MersenneTwister stream + inverse-CDF: the C++/R/Python port reproduces the C# draw bit-identically, so it carries rel 1e-9 (the fit-independent RNG bit-identity proof for the time-series draw path).
